_note: This snippet must be merged into the target project's component filters file (typically models/_component-filters.json).
_instruction: Add '{BLOCK_NAME}' to the 'main' filter's 'components' array. This registers it as a PAGE-LEVEL section component (not a block-level component).
_important: grid-columns is a SECTION-LEVEL component. It goes in _component-filters.json (alongside 'section', 'header-section', etc.), NOT in _section.json.
